load_all_memories: load all memories from user and project directories into a list of Memory objects
save_memory: save a Memory object to the project or user directory as a markdown file
delete_memory: delete a memory by its ID from the user or project memory directory
search_memories: search across all memories by keyword and return results sorted by relevance score
build_system_prompt_section: build a truncated memory section string for inclusion in an LLM system prompt
